---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an SDK capability or protocol addition
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

Describe the requested feature.

## Protocol or Registry Reference

Link to the RFC, draft, registry documentation, or extension specification.

## Use Case

Explain who needs this and why.

## Proposed API

Optional: sketch the request/response types or usage.

## Compatibility Notes

Describe whether this can be additive and whether it affects existing users.
